name: post2all
description: Teach Codex to use the Post2All CLI to create, schedule, update, and manage social posts.

interface.shortDescription: Manage social posts with the Post2All CLI.
interface.longDescription: Post2All teaches Codex how to use the Post2All CLI to discover connected accounts and create, schedule, inspect, update, cancel, or delete social posts with API-key authentication.
defaultPrompt: Create a draft post for my connected accounts.
Schedule this post with the Post2All CLI.
